Genista is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. 

The bioactive constituents of Genista include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins.

The most common herbal preparations made with Genista include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support immune function, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
